{"file_path":"/home/runner/.claude/plans/rosy-cuddling-twilight.md","content":"# Plan: Fix rebuilds from build stage to push to same PR

## Context

When `kody fix-ci` runs on an existing PR (a CI failure triggered a rebuild), the build stage runs on the **wrong branch** (the default branch checked out by the CI runner), not the PR's head branch. This causes the ship stage to create a **new PR** instead of pushing to the **existing PR**.

**Root cause** in `ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded` (line 16971 in `cli.js`): when `prNumber` is set, the function only syncs the base branch but never checks out the PR's head branch. The pipeline runs on the CI default branch, and `getPRForBranch(currentBranch)` in the ship stage can't find the existing PR — creating a duplicate.

The fix was planned in a previous run but never applied (the pipeline timed out before edits).

## Changes

Two targeted surgical edits to `node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js`:

**Root cause** in `ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded` (line 16971 in `cli.js`): when `prNumber` is set, the function only syncs the base branch but never checks out the PR's head branch.
